attributes.description: Detect and inventory Shadow AI tools across your fleet — local LLMs, AI coding agents, AI desktop applications, MCP servers (with config content scanning), AI model files, Python/npm AI packages, browser extensions, Docker containers, auto-start services, GPU-equipped systems, AI API key exposure, and AI tool configuration directories. Provides fleet-wide visibility into unauthorized or unmanaged AI deployments on endpoints.
attributes.name: ai-asset-discovery

queries.query:
-- Running LLM Runtime Detection
-- Identifies local LLM servers, inference engines, and AI model serving processes
-- Covers: Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, vLLM, GPT4All, Jan, LocalAI, KoboldCpp,
-- text-generation-webui, Open WebUI, AnythingLLM, LiteLLM, llamafile, MLC LLM, ComfyUI
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'ollama', 'lms', 'gpt4all', 'jan', 'msty', 'local-ai',
    'koboldcpp', 'llama-server', 'llama-cli', 'vllm',
    'mlc_llm', 'mlc_chat', 'anythingllm', 'anything-llm',
    'litellm', 'open-webui', 'llamafile', 'text-generation-launcher',
    'text-generation-router', 'comfyui', 'invokeai'
)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%ollama serve%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%vllm.entrypoints%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-launcher%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama-server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama.cpp%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llamafile%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mlc_llm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%open-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%localai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%oobabooga%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%stable-diffusion-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%whisper%server%';

-- Running AI Coding Agent Processes
-- Detects AI coding assistants, agents, and AI-powered terminals
-- These tools can read/write files, execute code, and interact with internal systems
-- Covers: Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Aider, Cline, Roo Code,
-- Continue, Codeium, Tabnine, Amazon Q, Sourcegraph Cody, Codex, Warp, Zed,
-- Pieces, ShellGPT, OpenHands, Supermaven
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'claude', 'cursor', 'windsurf', 'warp', 'zed',
    'tabnine', 'TabNine', 'WasmTabNine',
    'codeium_language_server', 'supermaven',
    'amazon-q', 'pieces-os', 'Pieces OS',
    'codex', 'aider', 'sgpt'
)
    -- Claude Code / Claude Desktop
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic-ai/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude_desktop%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%com.anthropic.claudedesktop%'
    -- Cursor
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor.app%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor Helper%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%cursor-retrieval%'
    -- Windsurf / Codeium
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Windsurf%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium_language_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium%enterprise%'
    -- GitHub Copilot
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%github.copilot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-agent%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-language-server%'
    -- OpenAI Codex CLI
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@openai/codex%'
    -- Aider
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider-chat%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider%--model%'
    -- Cline / Roo Code (VS Code extensions spawn node)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    -- Continue.dev
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continue.continue%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continuedev%'
    -- Amazon Q / CodeWhisperer
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codewhisperer%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%AmazonWebServices.amazon-q%'
    -- Sourcegraph Cody
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%sourcegraph.cody%'
    -- Tabnine
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tabnine%'
    -- Warp terminal (has AI built in)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.warp.Warp%'
    -- Zed editor (has AI built in)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.zed.Zed%'
    -- ShellGPT
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell_gpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell-gpt%'
    -- OpenHands / SWE-agent
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%swe-agent%'
    -- Pieces
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pieces-os%'
    -- Supermaven
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%supermaven%';

-- AI API Servers Exposed on Network
-- Detects AI services listening on non-loopback addresses (network-exposed)
-- Ports: 11434 Ollama, 1234/43411 LM Studio, 4891 GPT4All, 1337 Jan,
-- 5001 KoboldCpp, 7860 Gradio/HF, 8080 llama.cpp/LocalAI/TGI,
-- 8000 vLLM, 4000 LiteLLM, 3000 Open WebUI, 3001 AnythingLLM,
-- 8188 ComfyUI, 9090 InvokeAI, 1000 Pieces
SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000
)
    AND l.address != '127.0.0.1'
    AND l.address != '::1';

-- AI API Servers Inventory (Including Localhost)
-- Inventories ALL AI services on known ports, including loopback
-- Complements ai_listening_ports which only flags network-exposed servers
SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000
);

-- Installed AI Applications (macOS)
-- Detects AI desktop applications, coding tools, meeting AI, and productivity tools
SELECT
    name,
    path,
    bundle_identifier,
    bundle_short_version AS version,
    datetime(last_opened_time, 'unixepoch') AS last_opened_time
FROM apps
WHERE name IN (
    -- LLM runtimes
    'Ollama', 'LM Studio', 'GPT4All', 'Jan', 'Msty', 'AnythingLLM',
    -- AI chat/desktop
    'ChatGPT', 'Claude', 'Perplexity', 'DeepSeek', 'Poe',
    'Google Gemini', 'Microsoft Copilot',
    -- AI coding
    'Cursor', 'Windsurf', 'Zed', 'Warp', 'Void',
    'Pieces OS', 'Replit',
    -- AI image generation
    'DiffusionBee', 'Draw Things',
    -- AI productivity/meetings
    'Otter', 'Granola', 'Krisp', 'Raycast', 'TypingMind',
    'Notion', 'Craft'
)
    OR bundle_identifier IN (
    'com.openai.chat',
    'com.anthropic.claudedesktop',
    'ai.perplexity.app',
    'com.todesktop.230313mzl4w4u92',
    'com.ollama.ollama',
    'com.quora.poe',
    'dev.zed.Zed',
    'dev.warp.Warp-Stable',
    'com.raycast.macos',
    'ai.krisp.krispMac',
    'com.lmstudio.app',
    'com.codeium.windsurf',
    'io.gpt4all.gpt4all',
    'jan.ai',
    'com.diffusionbee.diffusionbee',
    'com.liuliu.draw-things',
    'notion.id',
    'com.lukilabs.lukiapp',
    'com.pieces.os',
    'com.msty.app'
);

-- Installed AI Applications (Windows)
-- Detects AI desktop applications, coding tools, and productivity tools
SELECT
    name,
    version,
    install_location,
    publisher,
    install_date
FROM programs
WHERE name LIKE '%Ollama%' OR name LIKE '%LM Studio%' OR name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR name LIKE '%Claude%' OR name LIKE '%Cursor%' OR name LIKE '%GPT4All%'
    OR name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR name LIKE '%Windsurf%' OR name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR name LIKE '%Jan%' OR name LIKE '%Msty%'
    OR name LIKE '%AnythingLLM%' OR name LIKE '%Open WebUI%'
    OR name LIKE '%Warp%' OR name LIKE '%Zed%' OR name LIKE '%Poe%'
    OR name LIKE '%Amazon Q%' OR name LIKE '%Pieces%'
    OR name LIKE '%Codeium%' OR name LIKE '%Tabnine%'
    OR name LIKE '%DiffusionBee%' OR name LIKE '%ComfyUI%'
    OR name LIKE '%LiteLLM%' OR name LIKE '%Notion%';

-- Installed AI Packages (Linux)
-- Detects AI-related system packages via deb and rpm package managers
SELECT name, version, source FROM deb_packages
WHERE name LIKE '%ollama%' OR name LIKE '%nvidia-cuda%'
UNION ALL
SELECT name, version, source FROM rpm_packages
WHERE name LIKE '%ollama%' OR name LIKE '%cuda%';

-- Running MCP Server Processes
-- Detects Model Context Protocol servers bridging AI tools to local resources
-- MCP servers provide filesystem, database, and API access to AI assistants
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.cmdline LIKE '%@modelcontextprotocol/%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-server-%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%fastmcp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%';

-- MCP Configuration Files (macOS)
-- Detects MCP config files for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code
-- Presence indicates MCP servers are configured (even if not currently running)
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE path LIKE '/Users/%/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.claude.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.claude/settings.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cursor/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.mcp.json';

-- MCP Configuration Files (Linux)
-- Detects MCP config files for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE path LIKE '/home/%/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.claude.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.claude/settings.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cursor/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.mcp.json';

-- MCP Configuration Files (Windows)
-- Detects MCP config files for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.claude.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.claude\settings.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cursor\mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.mcp.json';

-- AI Model Files (macOS)
-- Detects large model files (>100MB) in known AI model storage directories
-- Covers: Ollama, LM Studio, HuggingFace, llama.cpp, GPT4All, Jan
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/.ollama/models/blobs/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.lmstudio/models/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/lm-studio/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface/hub/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/llama.cpp/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.local/share/nomic.ai/GPT4All/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/jan/models/%'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files (Linux)
-- Detects large model files (>100MB) in known AI model storage directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/.ollama/models/blobs/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.lmstudio/models/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/huggingface/hub/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/llama.cpp/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.local/share/nomic.ai/GPT4All/%'
    OR path LIKE '/opt/models/%'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files (Windows)
-- Detects large model files (>100MB) in known AI model storage directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.ollama\models\blobs\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.lmstudio\models\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\huggingface\hub\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\llama.cpp\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\nomic.ai\GPT4All\%'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files by Extension (macOS)
-- Detects model weight files by extension in user directories
-- Catches models outside standard tool directories (manual downloads, custom paths)
-- Extensions: .gguf (llama.cpp), .safetensors (HuggingFace), .llamafile (llamafile),
-- .ggml (legacy), .onnx (ONNX Runtime)
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.onnx'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files by Extension (Linux)
-- Detects model weight files by extension in user and opt directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.onnx'
    OR path LIKE '/opt/%/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/opt/%/%.safetensors'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files by Extension (Windows)
-- Detects model weight files by extension in user directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.onnx'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI/ML Python Packages
-- Detects installed AI frameworks, model libraries, agent toolkits, and AI SDKs
SELECT
    name,
    version,
    directory
FROM python_packages
WHERE name IN (
    -- Core ML frameworks
    'torch', 'tensorflow', 'onnxruntime', 'jax', 'flax',
    -- HuggingFace ecosystem
    'transformers', 'diffusers', 'accelerate', 'peft', 'trl',
    'huggingface-hub', 'tokenizers', 'datasets', 'sentence-transformers',
    'safetensors',
    -- AI provider SDKs
    'openai', 'anthropic', 'google-generativeai', 'cohere', 'replicate',
    'groq', 'mistralai', 'together', 'fireworks-ai', 'deepseek-sdk',
    -- Agent/orchestration frameworks
    'langchain', 'langchain-core', 'langchain-community',
    'llama-index', 'llama-index-core',
    'autogen', 'crewai', 'semantic-kernel', 'haystack-ai', 'dspy-ai',
    'instructor', 'guidance', 'outlines',
    -- Local inference
    'llama-cpp-python', 'ollama', 'vllm', 'ctransformers',
    'bitsandbytes', 'auto-gptq', 'exllama',
    -- MCP
    'fastmcp', 'mcp',
    -- Vector databases
    'chromadb', 'qdrant-client', 'weaviate-client', 'pinecone-client',
    'pymilvus', 'faiss-cpu', 'faiss-gpu',
    -- AI coding agents
    'aider-chat', 'shell-gpt', 'mentat',
    -- AI app frameworks
    'gradio', 'streamlit',
    -- Audio/speech
    'openai-whisper', 'whisper', 'elevenlabs', 'bark',
    -- Proxy/gateway
    'litellm',
    -- LLM CLI tools
    'llm'
);

-- AI Browser Extensions (Chrome/Chromium/Edge)
-- Detects AI-related browser extensions for chat, coding, writing, and search
SELECT
    ce.name,
    ce.identifier,
    ce.version,
    ce.description,
    ce.path,
    u.username
FROM chrome_extensions ce
LEFT JOIN users u ON ce.uid = u.uid
WHERE
    -- AI assistants & chat
    ce.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR ce.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    -- AI coding
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    -- AI writing & productivity
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    -- AI search & research
    OR ce.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR ce.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    -- AI summarization
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    -- AI translation
    OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%';

-- AI Docker Containers
-- Detects containers with AI/ML, MCP, vector DB, or image generation images
SELECT
    id,
    name,
    image,
    status,
    command,
    started_at
FROM docker_containers
WHERE
    -- LLM serving
    image LIKE '%ollama%' OR image LIKE '%vllm%'
    OR image LIKE '%text-generation%' OR image LIKE '%localai%'
    OR image LIKE '%llama.cpp%' OR image LIKE '%litellm%'
    -- ML frameworks
    OR image LIKE '%pytorch%' OR image LIKE '%tensorflow%'
    OR image LIKE '%triton%' OR image LIKE '%huggingface%'
    -- MCP servers
    OR image LIKE '%mcp%' OR image LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
    -- AI apps
    OR image LIKE '%open-webui%' OR image LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR image LIKE '%flowise%' OR image LIKE '%langflow%'
    -- Vector databases
    OR image LIKE '%chromadb%' OR image LIKE '%chroma%'
    OR image LIKE '%qdrant%' OR image LIKE '%weaviate%'
    OR image LIKE '%milvus%' OR image LIKE '%pinecone%'
    -- Image generation
    OR image LIKE '%comfyui%' OR image LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
    OR image LIKE '%invokeai%' OR image LIKE '%automatic1111%'
    -- AI workflow/agents
    OR image LIKE '%n8n%' OR image LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR image LIKE '%sweepai%' OR image LIKE '%pr-agent%';

-- AI Auto-Start Services (macOS launchd)
-- Detects AI tools configured to start automatically
SELECT
    label,
    path,
    program_arguments,
    run_at_load
FROM launchd
WHERE label LIKE '%ollama%' OR label LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR label LIKE '%gpt4all%' OR label LIKE '%jan%'
    OR label LIKE '%anythingllm%' OR label LIKE '%pieces%'
    OR label LIKE '%open-webui%' OR label LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR label LIKE '%comfyui%' OR label LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%ollama%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%llama-server%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%mcp-server%';

-- AI Auto-Start Services (Windows)
-- Detects AI tools registered as Windows services
SELECT
    name,
    display_name,
    path,
    start_type,
    status,
    user_account
FROM services
WHERE name LIKE '%ollama%' OR name LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR name LIKE '%anythingllm%' OR name LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR name LIKE '%pieces%' OR name LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR display_name LIKE '%Ollama%' OR display_name LIKE '%LM Studio%'
    OR display_name LIKE '%AnythingLLM%' OR display_name LIKE '%LiteLLM%'
    OR display_name LIKE '%Pieces%'
    OR path LIKE '%ollama%' OR path LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR path LIKE '%llama-server%' OR path LIKE '%anythingllm%';

-- MCP npm Packages
-- Detects installed Model Context Protocol npm packages
SELECT
    name,
    version,
    directory,
    description
FROM npm_packages
WHERE name LIKE '@modelcontextprotocol/%'
    OR name LIKE 'mcp-server-%'
    OR name LIKE '%fastmcp%';

-- GPU-Equipped Systems (AI Inference Capability)
-- Detects NVIDIA, AMD, and Apple Silicon GPUs capable of running local LLMs
-- GPU presence + AI software = high-confidence shadow AI indicator
SELECT
    vendor,
    model,
    pci_class,
    pci_subclass,
    driver
FROM pci_devices
WHERE
    (vendor LIKE '%NVIDIA%' AND (pci_class = '0300' OR pci_class = '0302'))
    OR (vendor LIKE '%Advanced Micro Devices%' AND pci_class = '0300')
    OR vendor LIKE '%Apple%GPU%';

-- AI Tool Configuration Directories (macOS)
-- Detects AI tool config/cache dirs even when tools are not running
-- Presence indicates the tool was installed and used at some point
SELECT
    path,
    type,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/.ollama'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/lm-studio'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/gpt4all'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/llama.cpp'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/jan'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.continue'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cursor'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.codeium'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.tabnine'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.claude'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/github-copilot'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/shell_gpt'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.supermaven'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.anythingllm'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.invokeai'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.aider.conf.yml'
)
AND type = 'directory'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.aider.conf.yml';

-- AI Tool Configuration Directories (Linux)
SELECT
    path,
    type,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/.ollama'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/lm-studio'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/huggingface'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/gpt4all'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/llama.cpp'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/jan'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.continue'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cursor'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.codeium'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.tabnine'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.claude'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/github-copilot'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/shell_gpt'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.supermaven'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.anythingllm'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.invokeai'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.aider.conf.yml'
)
AND type = 'directory'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.aider.conf.yml';
